title: Biological control and biodiversity are not synonymous!
subtitle: ¡Control biológico y biodiversidad no son sinónimos!
description: A practice abstract clarifies that while biodiversity supports pest management, functional biodiversity must be strategically increased to enhance beneficial natural enemies. It presents the DiseñEN interactive decision-support tool, developed by Fundación Cajamar and IFAPA, to offer customized conservation biological control solutions for Mediterranean vegetable crops.
